CheckTitle: Ensure Privileged Role Administrator has no more than 2 assignments
Description: Checks whether the Privileged Role Administrator role has more than 2 permanent assignments. PRA can assign any role including Global Admin, making it the most dangerous escalation path in Entra ID.
Risk: Privileged Role Administrators can grant any directory role to any principal, including Global Administrator. Excessive PRA assignments multiply the risk of privilege escalation. Each PRA is a potential path to full tenant compromise.

Remediation.Recommendation: Reduce Privileged Role Administrator assignments to at most 2 principals. Use PIM for just-in-time activation where possible. Ensure PRA holders are break-glass accounts or tightly controlled identities.

SourceNotes: PRA is the most dangerous escalation role after Global Admin itself.
